name: Evaluation feedback

## Niche Tested

What niche/domain did you evaluate?

## Command

```bash
# Paste the command you ran. Remove private paths or labels.
```

## Top Results

Paste the top 5 topics from the Markdown report, including opportunity/confidence if possible.

## Your Judgment

Which results looked accurate, useful, or surprising?

## What Looks Wrong

Call out topics that seem saturated, too broad, irrelevant, too low-demand, or otherwise misranked.

## Evidence

Share public YouTube examples, search-result observations, or domain knowledge that supports your
judgment. Do not include API keys, private cache databases, client/customer research, or sensitive
reports.

## Suspected Signal

If you can tell, which signal needs work?

- Demand / view velocity
- Relevance matching
- Competition / authority concentration
- Small-channel beatability
- Trends
- Monetization / CPM
- Comments / unmet demand
- Content-depth / quality gap
- Confidence
- Not sure
